title: EnchantMe
description: EnchantMe adds 400+ custom enchantments to your server through physical enchant books. Featuring enchants across 8 categories — Sword, Bow, Armor, Tool, Ultra, Mega, and Special — ranging from balanced utility perks to insane god-tier abilities l
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/fn2PiMrJwPU" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

# ✨ EnchantMe

**400+ custom enchantments for your Minecraft server — from balanced utility perks to absolute god-tier power.**

EnchantMe completely overhauls the enchantment experience by introducing hundreds of unique custom enchants delivered as **physical enchant books**. Apply them directly to your gear, stack effects, and unleash devastating combinations that vanilla enchantments could never offer.

---
---

### important note:
You are free to use this plugin on your server. You may not decompile, redistribute, or use the source code without explicit permission from the author.

---
---

## ⚔️ Sword Enchants

Dominate melee combat with enchants built for every playstyle.

| Enchant | Description |
|---|---|
| Frostbite Edge | Inflict frostbite stacks — at 5 stacks target shatters for massive damage |
| Ravage Blade | Stack DoT on every hit — 10 stacks triggers instant death |
| Demon Edge | Damage scales with how low your HP is |
| Assassin's Blade | Deal 3x damage when attacking from behind |
| Fury of Steel | Consecutive hits stack up to +100% bonus damage |
| Blood Moon | At night, all attacks deal +50% damage and steal life |
| Plague Blade | Infect target with a plague that spreads to nearby entities |
| Chaos Nova | Unleash a random nova every 8s dealing chaos effects to all nearby |
| Cleave | Every melee hit splashes 60% damage to entities within 3 blocks |
| Void Rend | Leaves a damaging rift that persists for 6 seconds |
| Gladiator Strike | +2 damage per kill this session — snowballs hard |
| Absolute Zero | Flash-freeze target solid for 3 seconds then shatter them |
| Drain Field | Steals health from all nearby enemies every second |
| Condemn | Mark target — all attacks deal double damage for 4 seconds |
| Angel Slayer | Massive bonus damage to targets with full HP |
| *...and many more* | |

---

## 🏹 Bow Enchants

Rain destruction from a distance with some of the most explosive bow abilities in any plugin.

| Enchant | Description |
|---|---|
| Arrow Rain | Summons a rain of arrows from the sky covering a wide area |
| Homing Arrow | Splits into homing projectiles that seek nearby enemies |
| Necromancer Arrow | Raises a zombie skeleton army from fallen nearby enemies |
| Gravity Warp Arrow | Reverses gravity near target — entities float upward uncontrollably |
| Void Portal Arrow | Opens a void portal that teleports all nearby enemies to random locations |
| Tidal Wave Arrow | Summons a massive tidal wave that sweeps enemies away |
| Twister Arrow | Creates a mini-tornado that throws all nearby enemies sky high |
| Dragon's Breath | Releases a stream of dragon fire in a cone on impact |
| Mind Control Arrow | Temporarily turns nearby mobs against the target |
| Eruption Arrow | Triggers a volcanic eruption spewing lava and debris |
| Frost Lance | A lance of ice impales target and freezes them instantly |
| Quantum Arrow | Splits across dimensions — hits the target 5 times simultaneously |
| Null Arrow | Removes all potion effects, armor buffs, and deals true damage |
| *...and many more* | |

---

## 🛡️ Armor Enchants

Survive anything. Punish everyone who dares attack you.

| Enchant | Description |
|---|---|
| Phoenix Rise | Near death: burst into phoenix flames, heal and burn all nearby |
| Soul Shield | Absorb damage into a shield that converts to health when full |
| Prismatic Shield | Random elemental retaliation every time you're hit |
| Shadow Cloak | On low HP, vanish and teleport behind your attacker |
| God Armor | Divine protection — block massive hits and punish attackers |
| Titan Core | Massive HP boost and passive strength — true tank enchant |
| Celestial Guard | When nearly dead, call celestial meteors to destroy enemies |
| Chain React | Being hit chains lightning to attacker and 2 nearby enemies |
| Berserker Armor | Getting hit makes you temporarily stronger and faster |
| Obsidian Skin | Chance to completely negate all incoming damage |
| Vampire Armor | Drain life from attacker whenever you're hit |
| BoulderArmor | Harden like a boulder on hit — massive resistance for 3 seconds |
| Star Forged | Armor forged from stars — regen HP faster than normal |
| *...and many more* | |

---

## ⛏️ Tool Enchants

Mine smarter, farm faster, and do things no vanilla tool ever could.

| Enchant | Description |
|---|---|
| Earth Shaker | Break a 3x3x3 cube of blocks in one hit |
| Tree Feller+ | Fell entire large trees instantly |
| Time Warp | Blocks break 4x faster |
| Mass Harvest | Harvest all mature crops in a 5x5 area |
| Gem Sniffer | Alerts you when rare ores are within 5 blocks |
| Smelt On Break | Automatically smelts iron and gold ore on break |
| Drill Bit | Mine in a 3x3 cross pattern |
| Tunnel Vision | Break a 1x3 tunnel in the direction you're facing |
| Cave Seeker | Highlights caves and hollow areas when mining nearby |
| Explosive Fishing | Bobber explodes on reel-in catching everything nearby |
| *...and many more* | |

---

## 🌟 Special & Mega Enchants

The most powerful enchants in the plugin — reserved for endgame gear.

| Enchant | Description |
|---|---|
| Omega Strike | On kill, deal massive splash damage to ALL nearby enemies |
| Ascension Blade | More kills this life = more damage. No cap |
| Abyssal Core | Feed the abyss with hits — at 20 hits release a void explosion |
| World Breaker | Your strike resonates through the world, hitting enemies in a massive radius |
| Divine Smite | Guaranteed critical hit with holy damage |
| Chaos Blade | Randomly applies one of 8 devastating effects per hit |
| Nova Burst | Trigger a supernova — massive expanding ring of damage |
| Soul Storm | Releases soul energy that damages and weakens all nearby |

---


## 🔧 Commands

| Command | Permission | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `/enchantme <id> [level]` | `enchantme.give` | Give an enchant book |
| `/enchantlist [page]` | `enchantme.list` | Browse all enchants |
| `/enchantremove <id>` | `enchantme.give` | Remove enchant from held item |

---

## 📦 Dependency

> ⚠️ **This plugin requires [ShopEnchantMe](https://modrinth.com) to be installed.**
> Please download and install **ShopEnchantMe** before using EnchantMe.

---
